info.title: eCFR Versioner API (checked-in subset)
info.description: Hand-maintained Swagger 2.0 subset of the public, keyless eCFR versioner API (17 U.S.C. 105 public domain). Exposes the two currency-metadata listing endpoints the driver consumes: the CFR titles catalog and the CFR agencies catalog. Source of record for the bespoke code generator; the eCFR site does not publish a cleanly machine-fetchable spec (see the P1 generator spike).

get.summary: List all CFR titles and their currency metadata.
List all agencies represented in the CFR.

Title.description: A single CFR title with the currency metadata the eCFR versioner reports for it (identity plus the dates that describe how current the published content is).

number.description: The CFR title number (1 through 50) that uniquely identifies the title.

name.description: The official name of the CFR title.

latest_amended_on.description: Date on which the title's regulatory content was most recently amended (ISO YYYY-MM-DD).

latest_issue_date.description: Date of the most recent published issue of the title in eCFR (ISO YYYY-MM-DD).

up_to_date_as_of.description: Date through which the title's content is confirmed current in eCFR (ISO YYYY-MM-DD).

reserved.description: Whether the title number is reserved, meaning it carries no current regulatory content.

TitlesResponse.description: Response envelope for the eCFR titles listing endpoint, wrapping the full catalog of CFR titles.

titles.description: The catalog of CFR titles, each with its currency metadata.

Agency.description: A single agency represented in the CFR, with the naming and slug metadata the eCFR versioner reports for it.

name.description: The full, official name of the agency.

short_name.description: Abbreviated form of the agency name, when eCFR provides one.

display_name.description: Human-readable agency name intended for presentation in UI.

sortable_name.description: Agency name normalized for alphabetical sorting (e.g. leading articles removed).

slug.description: URL-safe identifier for the agency, used as its key in eCFR API paths.

AgenciesResponse.description: Response envelope for the eCFR agencies listing endpoint, wrapping the full roster of agencies represented in the CFR.

agencies.description: The roster of agencies represented in the CFR, each with its naming and slug metadata.
